"""Errors when Graphite is not enabled.""" error_message = '--stack requires Graphite for stack tracking.\n\nTo enable Graphite: erk config set use_graphite true' def invariant(condition: bool, error_message: str) -> None: """Ensure condition is true, otherwise output styled error and exit. error_message: Error message to display if condition is false. "Error: " prefix will be added automatically in red. UserFacingCliError: If condition is false > raise UserFacingCliError(error_message) E erk.cli.ensure.UserFacingCliError: --stack requires Graphite for stack tracking. src/erk/cli/ensure.py:71: UserFacingCliError FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py::TestResolveStack::test_requires_graphite - erk.cli.ensure.UserFacingCliError: --stack requires Graphite for stack tracking. !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! ========================= 1 failed, 1 passed in 1.78s ==========================
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 failed
**Test Results Summary:** - Total: 16 collected - Passed: 1 - Failed: 1 - Stopped at first failure with `-x` flag
**Failure Details:**
**File:** tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py::TestResolveStack::test_requires_graphite
**Error:** `UserFacingCliError` raised instead of `SystemExit`
The test expects `_resolve_stack()` to raise `SystemExit` when Graphite is disabled, but the actual implementation raises `UserFacingCliError`. The test needs to be updated to expect the correct exception type.
**Code Location:** - Test file: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py:107` - Implementation: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py:136` - Exception class: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/ensure.py:71`
The implementation uses `Ensure.invariant()` which raises `UserFacingCliError` for validation failures, but the test fixture is catching `SystemExit`.
